titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Records of Mission and World Christian Agencies and Organizations
Records of Mission and World Christian Agencies and Organizations
titlestmt.author: Martha Lund Smalley

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday December 18, 2025 at 18:00

did.unittitle: Records of Mission and World Christian Agencies and Organizations
did.abstract: This collection draws together mostly printed documentation relating to mission agencies and World Christian churches. It complements other substantial archival collections held by the Divinity Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The modern Protestant missionary movement dates to 1792 when William Carey was instrumental in founding the Baptist Missionary Society in England and went to India as a missionary, landing in Calcutta [Kolkata] in November of 1793. Catholic missionaries were sent around the world well before this. Various Protestant denominations as well as independent agencies established missionary societies beginning in the 19th century and over time independent indigenous churches and mission agencies arose in the areas where missionaries had served.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Series III: Europe and the United Kingdom
Series IV: Latin America and the Caribbean

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Much of this collection consists of printed or mimeographed reports, memos, brochures and other documentation of the work of the Western mission agencies and the indigenous churches and organizations that arose out of the missionary movement. This material came to the Divinity Library in various ways over the years. The documentation in this collection is not comprehensive but it provides useful background and detail about mission agencies and Christian organizations in the areas served by missionaries. The majority of the material in this collection dates from the 19th and 20th centuries.

The organizations included in this collection have been filed according to the geographical location of their administrative headquarters, which in many cases differed from their geographical areas of service. This collection excludes materials that were included in Yale Divinity Library Record Group 342, Records of Ecumenical Work for Coordination and Documentation of Missions and World Christianity, and Record Group 347, Records of Mission and World Christian Educational and Medical Institutions and Organizations.
This collection includes materials that were formerly cataloged by the Library with HR call numbers, standing for "Historical Records."

did.unittitle: Union pour l'Evangelisation des Musulmans du Nord de l'Afrique

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, appeals regarding missions to Muslims.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Programme for promotion of elementary schools in rural areas prepared by organization based in Ouagadougou, formerly Upper Volta, now Burkina Faso

did.unittitle: Catholic Church. National Episcopal Conference of Cameroon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working paper of the National Ecumenical Episcopal Commission ("Commission episcopal nationale oecumenique") "On Mixed Marriage"

did.unittitle: Eglise Presbytérienne Camerounaise / Presbyterian Church in Cameroon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution, anniversary booklet, General Assembly minutes, newsletter, report.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: PUblication of Christian student movement headquartered in Bangui.

did.unittitle: Eglise Protestante Méthodiste en Côte d'Ivoire

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This area was colonized by the Belgians and known as the Belgian Congo prior to 1960 when it became The Republic of the Congo. The country was known as Zaire from 1971 to 1997 when the name was changed to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) by President Laurent-Désiré Kabila after he overthrew President Joseph-Désiré Mobutu.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Program for "Manifestation de Beinvenue" organized by Vicaire Apostolique de Leopoldville (1953). Pamphlet in French about African liturgy published by Commission Episcopale de l'Evangelisation (1974)

did.unittitle: Centre Chrétien d'Action pour les Dirigeants et Cadres des Entreprises

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Circulaire no. 5 of organization headquartered in Kinshasa.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Catalogue, slides, tapes, pamphlets produced by Catholic publisher.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter for organization headquartered in Kinshasa-Gombe.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Eswatini was formerly known as Swaziland.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochure on the Ethiopian Orthodox Church Development Commission, publications.

did.unittitle: Young Men's Christian Association of Ethiopia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Facsimiles of postage stamps, some commemorating the Catholic Church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 222nd anniversary program, Church of the Province of West Africa and deed of agreement for the establishment of Joint Anglican Diocesan Council of Ghana.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Partner letters for organization based in Accra, which was involved with church planting/growth and missionary endeavors.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter of the Holy Ghost Cathedral; 43rd International Eucharistic Congress, Nairobi, 1985; eye-witness account of violence in Juba; "Catholic-Muslim Relationship", "Statement of the Catholic Bishops of Kenya on the just ended general elections", Justice and Peace Commission Inter-diocesan Workshops, and a pastoral letter.

did.unittitle: Church of the Province of Kenya. Diocese of Nairobi. Diocesan Missionary Association

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Catalogue of courses, newsletters, research summaries for organization based in Nairobi.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Journal issue for organization based in Nairobi.

did.unittitle: Jesuit Refugee Service, Eastern Africa Regional Office

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Issue of periodical Kenya Refugee Notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters, brochures for organization based in Maseru.

did.unittitle: Liberia Baptist Missionary and Educational Convention

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Souvenir program for 99th session of the Association.

did.unittitle: Christian Service Committee of the Churches in Malawi

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochures, reports for social issues organization.

did.unittitle: Catholic Church, Episcopal Conference of Mali

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Joint statement of "les chefs religieux" of AMUPI, the Catholic Church, and the Protestant Church.

did.unittitle: Catholic Church, Diocese of Port Louis
Verenigde Evangeliese Lutherse Kerk in SWA

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: VELKSWA periodical issue (United Evangelical Lutheran Church in Southwest Africa.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Convention report, minutes of Annual Elder's Meeting, 80th birthday celebration program for President of Church.

did.unittitle: Church of the Brethren in Nigeria / Ekklesiyar 'Yanuwa a Nigeria

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution for Church of Nigeria uniting Anglican, Methodist, and Presbyterian Churches

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution and by-laws, convention proceedings, publication.

did.unittitle: Church of the Province of South Africa
Reports on marriage, Commission on "The Just War", investments, newsletter
See and Seek - official newspaper of Church
Diocese of Grahamstown - listing of archives of Diocese
Diocese of Natal - acts and resolutions of the Diocesan Synod.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual reports, brochures, postcards, documenting work in the Southern Transvaal and the Dioceses of Grahamstown, Matabeleland, Mashonaland and Northern Rhodesia. Also includes Fraternity of the Resurrection work in South Africa.

did.unittitle: Congregational Church, Caledon Square, Cape Town
Ethiopian Catholic Church of South Africa

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Quarterly record for church located in Durban.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports and statements, syllabus of religious education.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Issues of Ons familie : 'n maandblad vir die nuwe apostoliese gesin magazine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: History of the Women's Association, Proceedings of the General Assembly, newsletter.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handbook for non-profit association providing social service to the poor and disadvantaged since 1925.

did.unittitle: Trauma Centre for Victims of Violence and Torture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual report of organization that was founded in the early 1990s as a project of the South African Health and Social Services Organisation (SAHSSO) and the Anglican Church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochures, newspaper clippings of organization uniting the Y.M.C.A. and Toc H South African War Work Council.

did.unittitle: Women's Association of the African Independent Churches
Young Men's Christian Association, South African National Council
Catholic Church. Conference of Bishops of Sudan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Statistical report of Catholic workers and institutions.

did.unittitle: Pastoral and Research Institute of Tanzania
Catholic Church. Catholic Commission on Justice and Peace in Rhodesia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Diocese of Mashonaland, report on education.

did.unittitle: Rhodesia Annual Conference of the United Methodist Church (U.S.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Official journals of conference. For earlier material, see Series VI, North America, United States, Methodist Church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters, minutes of Constitutional Settlement Talks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Communication from the Catholic Bishops' Conference of Bangladesh to the Synod of Bishops in Rome.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Program of opening service, September 2, 1979. The church, located in Shanghai, was formerly known as Moore Memorial Church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter from organization located in Shanghai.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report for organization with headquarters in Tientsin [Tianjin]

did.unittitle: Association for the Promotion of the New Life Movement

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report for organization with headquarters in Nanchang.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: First annual report of the Society, based in Canton [Quangzhou].

did.unittitle: Canton Committee for Justice to China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters, pictorial brochure published by organization headquarterd in Canton [Guangzhou].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters for organization headquartered in Shanghai.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: News release for organization headquartered in Chungking [Chongqing].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual reports, fifteenth anniversary book (1921-1936), famine prevention project booklet for organization established in 1921 with headquarters in Peking to handle relief operations and administer a trust fund.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports for organization that had various branch offices throughout China.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter and bulletins for organization headquartered in Shanghai.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual reports, publications catalogues, pictorial history, serial publications.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications of Anglican church in China [Zhong Hua Sheng Gong Hui], including general statistics, newsletter, pastoral letter, Church's call to action (letters from the Student Church in Tokyo to members and friends, 1917-18).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications, minutes, reports, circular letters of the Church of Christ in China [Zhonghua ji du jiao hui], headquartered in Shanghai.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochures, newsletters, photograph of dolls made at mission. The Door of Hope was a rescue mission for Chinese children and girls in Shanghai, China, begun in 1901.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Periodical publications, brochures, manuscript history of mission established in Shiu Hing, South China in 1904. Its primary work was concerned with missions and an orphanage for blind girls.

did.unittitle: International Committee of the Red Cross, Central China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, directory for Central China, correspondence in German, French, and English.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prospectuses, brochures, reports of organization founded by Gilbert Reid in Shanghai in 1894. Annual reports and International Journal are cataloged separately.

did.unittitle: League of Ten for National Salvation of China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two brochures related to the League of Ten for National Salvation of China Through Faith and Works of Chinese Christians, based in Nanking [Nanjing].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications of organization associated with the Young Men's Christian Association, Peking [Beijing].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochures, "Notes and Notices" publication for church located in Nanking [Nanjing].

did.unittitle: North China Christian Rural Service Unio

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, newsletters in English and Chinese, publications.

did.unittitle: North Manchuria International Christian Workers Fellowship Union

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters, orders of worship, publications for church located in Peking [Beijing].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters. Annual Reports for this organization for the years 1918-19, 1922, and 1940 are available in the cataloged collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochure for organization headquartered in Peiping [Beijing].

did.unittitle: School and Text Book Series Committee

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report for organization located in Shanghai.

did.unittitle: Society of Friends of Moslems in China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two issues of the Quarterly newsletter, questionnaire. Periodical publications of the Society are available in Library's cataloged collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handbook, history of mission based in Tai Ming Fu, North China.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, including by Kiang Wen-Han, Siu-May Ting.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Program of lectures for 1916-1917 for group of missionaries meeting in Tientsin [Tianjin].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report.related to rural work in North China.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report of meeting of Lutheran missionaries in Kikungshan [Jigongshan, Henan].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, publications in English and Chinese.

did.unittitle: Young Men's Christian Associations of China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, publications, brochures, including Chinese language material.

did.unittitle: Young Men's Christian Associations of China and Korea
Young Women's Christian Association of China
Center for the Progress of Peoples

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Informational brochure about Center established in 1979 with headquarters in Kowloon.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publication. See also extensive holdings that were digitized as part of the Divinity Library's Documentation of Christianity in China project.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications, anniversary booklet, newsletters in Chinese.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports and historical sketch of church located in Kowloon.

Hong Kong Association of Christian Missions
Hong Kong Chinese Young Men's Christian Association
Hong Kong Council of the Church of Christ in China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.p: Reports of organization located in Bombay [Mumbai].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report of social service organization located in Bombay [Mumbai].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report for organization located in Bombay [Mumbai].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual report of organization sponsored by the Methodist Church in Southern Asia, Church of North India, Mar Thoma Church, and Roman Catholic Church.

scopecontent.p: Reports of organization established by Bishop Wilson of the Church of England in 1841, based in Calcutta [Kolkata].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pamphlet describing the organization based in Aundh, Bombay [Mumbai] presidency.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Informational brochure regarding organization located at Baring College, Batala, Punjab.

did.unittitle: Christian Institute for the Study of Religion and Society

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report, dedication of the Devanandan House and public meeting, issue of Bulletin of institute located in Bangalore [Bengaluru].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution and by-laws, informational pamphlet, and other publication of organization located in Raypur, sponsored by dioceses of the Church of North India and Regional Conferences of the Methodist Church in India.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution and pamphlets related to organization in Madura and Ramnad [Ramanathapuram] Districts.

did.unittitle: Church of India, Burma and Ceylon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution and other publications of Anglican church that became one of the three uniting churches to constitute the Church of South India.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See also online databases held by the Divinity Library: Archives of the Church in North India. Monograph collection and Archives of the Church in North India, Archival collection.

did.unittitle: Related to Diocese of Delhi, St. James's Church Delhi, Nagpur Diocese, work in Punjab
Pamphlets of liturgies for various church sacraments

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report of conference held in Pasumalai, South India.

did.unittitle: Convention of Baptist Churches of the Northern Circar
Council of Baptist Churches in North East India

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed booklet of correspondence relating to organization in Bombay [Mumbai], dating 1844 to 1850.

did.unittitle: Full Gospel Young Men Association India
German Mission in the Southern Maratha, Canara, and Malabar Provinces

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Golden Jubilee Celebrations program for church located in Bangalore [Bengaluru.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newspaper articles. See also Wiser Papers, Yale Divinity Library Record Group 128.

did.unittitle: Indian Home Mission to the Santhals and Colony of Assam
Joint Committee on Church Union in South India
Joint Committee on Union of the Church of England in India and the South India United Church

Joint Council of the United Church of Northern India, the Methodist Episcopal Church in Southern Asia, and the Churches Associated with the Baptist Missionary Society in India, and with the London Missionary Society in Bengal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plan of Union, containing a preamble, basis of union, proposed constitution and proposed procedure for the inauguration of union.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochure about mission located in Calcutta [Kolkata].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles of association for organization in Madras [Chennai].

did.unittitle: Methodist Church in India, Ceylon and Burma
Reports of South India Provincial Synod, list of missionaries
Reports, of South India Provincial Synod, report of Trichinopoly Mass Movement Commission
Reports of South India Provincial Synod, Commission to the Madras District
Reports of South India Provincial Synod, Commission to Mysore, Methodist Law and Discipline
Reports of South India Provincial Synod

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Journal of Moradabad Annual Conference and Moradabad Woman's Conference, Annual Conference Appointments

did.unittitle: National Biblical, Catechetical, and Liturgical Centre

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records include selected issues from the Document series, Inculturation pamphlet series, Information leaflet series, Report series, Seminar leaflet/booklet series, Statement series, and miscellaneousl publications. Monographic material published by the N.B.C.L.C. may be found in the cataloged collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Originally called the National Christian Council of India, Burma and Ceylon. Earlier records are filed under National Missionary Council of India.

did.unittitle: Related to Christian literature, including Committee for Literature on Social Concerns

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Later known as the National Christian Council of India. Proceedings of Council and Executive Committee meetings, survey of Muslims of India, missionary survey.

did.unittitle: Negotiating Committee for Church Union in North India and Pakistan
North-Western Provinces and Oudh Sunday School Union
Orthodox Syrian Church of the East

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publication, printed program for church located in Bangalore [Bengaluru].

did.unittitle: Representative Council of Missions for the United Provinces

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report, minutes of church that became one of the three uniting churches to constitute the Church of South India.

did.unittitle: St. Michael and All Angels' Church

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, issue of parish magazine for church located at Oorgaum, Kolar Gold Fields.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Centenary report for church located in Ootacamund.

did.unittitle: Student Christian Movement of India, Burma, and Ceylon
Syro-Malabar Major Archiepiscopal Church of Ernakulam-Angamally

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Acts of the Synod of Bishops of the Syro-Malabar Church.

did.unittitle: Union of Christian Endeavor for India, Burma, and Ceylon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes, reports of body that was formed by the union of the Presbyterian Church of India and the Congregational Church of Western India in 1924 and merged with other Protestant churches in India to form the Church of North India in 1970.

did.unittitle: United Council on Work Among Young People in India
Young Men's Christian Association of India

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, newsletter, publications, including of Young Men's Christian Associations of India, Pakistan, Burma and Ceylon.

did.unittitle: Young Women's Christian Association of India

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: History.reports, including of Young Women's Christian Associations of India, Burma and Ceylon.
